measured.label: MEASURED
measured.source: on-metal NVML (nvidia-smi power.draw, 1 Hz) - sovereign GPU betterwithage / NVIDIA RTX 5050 Laptop, via Tailscale; founder-captured 2026-06-14
measured.note: MEASURED energy: avg_power_w=56.18 W (arithmetic mean of 91 real nvidia-smi power.draw samples at 1 Hz), wall_time_s=91 s, temperature_k=341.3 K (68.1 C mean). Captured on the sovereign GPU betterwithage / NVIDIA RTX 5050 Laptop under sustained qwen2.5-coder:7b inference (the model class the Lambda-gate governor uses), driven over Tailscale from the a11oy box; idle was ~12 W, peak ~68 W. Energy = MEASURED power x MEASURED time = 5112 J (real readings, NOT TDP/nameplate, NOT fabricated). bit_operations / bits_erased / info_content_bits are MODELED workload descriptors (2 * 7.6e9 params * ~3160 tokens sustained 7B inference; bits_erased = ops*64 conservative float64; info_content nominal) and are explicitly NOT measured. The numpy agentic-PINN PDE solve runs separately on SZL metal and writes /solve; this certificate certifies the MEASURED GPU inference energy sits far above the Landauer floor and far below the Margolus-Levitin / Bremermann / Bekenstein ceilings. No over-unity. Doctrine v11.

summary: This compute job used 5112 J (DERIVED = 56.18 W MEASURED × 91 s MEASURED) = 5.1e+08× the Landauer erasure floor (1.003e-05 J). It ran at 1.71e-24% of the Margolus-Levitin maximum rate (3.086e+37 ops/s) and 7.78e-36% of the Bremermann limit. Information content (1e+12 bits) is 3.41e-15% of the Bekenstein ceiling (2.932e+28 bits), far under the holographic ceiling (6.94e+66 bits). VERDICT: PHYSICALLY BOUNDED by established law — the honest inverse of a free-energy claim. No over-unity. No fabricated number.

attribution.landauer: Landauer, R. (1961), IBM J. Res. Dev. 5(3):183-191, doi:10.1147/rd.53.0183 — min erase energy kT·ln2 per bit.
attribution.bremermann: Bremermann, H.J. (1962), Self-Organizing Systems — max c²/h ≈ 1.356e50 bits/s per kg.
attribution.bekenstein: Bekenstein, J.D. (1981), Phys. Rev. D 23(2):287, doi:10.1103/PhysRevD.23.287 — I ≤ 2πRE/(ħc·ln2) bits.
attribution.bekenstein_hawking: Hawking, S.W. (1975), Commun. Math. Phys. 43:199-220, doi:10.1007/BF02345020 — holographic area-law ceiling.
attribution.honesty: Established physics, cited not claimed. The certificate is the HONEST INVERSE of a free-energy claim: it proves the job is physically bounded, asserts no over-unity, fabricates no number.

doctrine: v11 LOCKED: NO free-energy/over-unity (this certificate PROVES bounded energy use — the honest inverse); joules DERIVED ONLY from MEASURED power×time (SAMPLE until a real exporter is wired); physics bounds CITED, not claimed as SZL's; Λ=Conjecture 1 (advisory, never 'proven trust'); locked-proven=8; SLSA L1 honest; sovereign own-metal; no fabricated numbers.

labels.MEASURED: observed from a real exporter (NVML) or honestly-labelled sample
labels.DERIVED: computed from MEASURED inputs via CITED established-physics formulas

lambda_note: Λ = Conjecture 1 (advisory). States physical FACTS (bounds), not 'proven trust'. Makes NO free-energy claim. Gate is deny-by-default.
